reviews.review_msg: Overall, fantastic. He used to always bring his kid to class who would search up Dogs on the projector. Word on the street is he found that child at an Asian Studies convention last year. Who knows, but I think he's better at this class than me LOL

Massimo was a great professor. HE presented very interesting lectures throughout the year. If you PUT an effort in, IT will be easy. But that is UP to you. In MY experience, the assignments could be a pain in the BUTT sometimes. However, FOR most of the year AN easy way to do well was to find A friend to work together.
At first I had an F in the course but we made alternative arrangements so it turned out alright.
